ogTitle: Croudace Bay vs Crowdy Bay National Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Croudace Bay and Crowdy Bay National Park.
heading: Croudace Bay vs Crowdy Bay National Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Croudace Bay, New South Wales and Crowdy Bay National Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crowdy Bay National Park has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Croudace Bay (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Croudace Bay or Crowdy Bay National Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Croudace Bay has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Crowdy Bay National Park scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Croudace Bay scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Crowdy Bay National Park scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Croudace Bay or Crowdy Bay National Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crowdy Bay National Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
